/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Sprite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/TileMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/soil.c.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/image_dxt.c.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/image_helper.c.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/stb_image_aug.c.o -o BugsBunnyCrazyCastle -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL
